---
title: "P1. Screening of bioactive components from Qifu Decoction"
date: "2025-11-21"
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo
    toc: true
    page-layout: full
    toc-depth: 3
    number-sections: true
    smooth-scroll: true
---

---

# LC-MS-Based Serum Pharmacochemical Profiling

## Tan2012

- **标题**：Detection and identification of diterpenoid alkaloids, isoflavonoids and saponins in Qifu decoction and rat plasma by liquid chromatography-time-of-flight mass spectrometry [@tan2012qfda]

- **PubMed ID**：21594877 

- **期刊**：Biomedical Chromatography（BMC） 

- **核心数据**：

  - 采用LC-TOF-MS技术首次系统表征芪附汤体外及体内入血成分；
  
  - 体外水煎液共鉴定**44种化学成分**，包含21种附子二萜生物碱、12种黄芪异黄酮、11种黄芪三萜皂苷；
  
  - 大鼠口服给药后血浆中鉴定出**22种入血原型成分**，未检出体内代谢产物；
  
  - 证实黄芪与附子共煎可改变生物碱溶出比例，为复方配伍物质基础提供早期实验依据。
  
- **核心价值**：业内首篇系统阐明芪附汤“体外成分-体内入血原型”对应关系的SCI文献，奠定芪附汤血清药物化学研究范式，可为本次研究体外成分库构建、入血原型成分初筛提供权威溯源依据，解决传统网络药理学仅用数据库预测、无体内实验支撑的短板。

- **用途**：体外成分基线数据、早期入血原型成分佐证、配伍溶出规律依据。

::: {#supptbl-tan2012}
| Compound.English | Compound.Chinese | Source | Chemical_Category | In_vitro_Detection | In_vivo_Blood_Absorption |
|------------------|------------------|--------|-------------------|--------------------|--------------------------|
| Karakolidine | 卡拉可定 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Chuanfumine | 川乌明 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Mesaconine | 新乌宁碱 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| 16β-hydroxycardiopetaline | 16β-羟基卡品碱 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Undetectable |
| Senbusine A | 森布辛A | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Undetectable |
| Isotalatizidine | 异塔拉替定 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Undetectable |
| Aconine | 乌头原碱 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Songorine | 松果灵 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Hetisine | 异替辛 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Undetectable |
| Hypaconine | 次乌头原碱 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Fuziline | 附子灵 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Neoline | 尼奥林 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Talatisamine | 塔拉乌头胺 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Guan fu base H | 关附碱H | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Undetectable |
| 14-Acetyneoline | 14-乙酰尼奥林 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Undetectable |
| 14-Acetylkarakoline | 14-乙酰卡拉可林 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Calycosin-7-O-β-D-glucoside | 毛蕊异黄酮-7-O-β-D-葡萄糖苷 | Astragalus membranaceus | Flavonoid glycoside | Detected | Detectable |
| 14-Acetyltalatizamine | 14-乙酰塔拉乌头胺 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Amine-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Undetectable |
| Benzoylmesaconitine | 苯甲酰中乌头碱 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Monoester-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Calycosin-7-O-β-D-glc-6"-O-acetate | 毛蕊异黄酮-7-葡萄糖-6"-乙酸酯 | Astragalus membranaceus | Acetylated flavonoid glycoside | Detected | Undetectable |
| Benzoylaconine | 苯甲酰乌头原碱 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Monoester-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| Formononetin-O-β-D-glucoside | 芒柄花苷 | Astragalus membranaceus | Flavonoid glycoside | Detected | Detectable |
| Benzoylhypaconine | 苯甲酰次乌头原碱 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Monoester-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Detectable |
| 9,10-dimethoxy-pterocarpan-3-O-β-D-glucoside | 9,10-二甲氧基紫檀烷-3-O-β-D-葡萄糖苷 | Astragalus membranaceus | Pterocarpan glycoside | Detected | Detectable |
| 2'-hydroxy-3',4'-dimethoxyisoflavan-7-O-β-D-glucoside | 2'-羟基-3',4'-二甲氧基异黄烷-7-O-葡萄糖苷 | Astragalus membranaceus | Isoflavan glycoside | Detected | Detectable |
| Benzoyldeoxyaconine | 苯甲酰脱氧乌头原碱 | Aconitum carmichaelii | Monoester-type diterpenoid alkaloid | Detected | Undetectable |
| Calycosin | 毛蕊异黄酮 | Astragalus membranaceus | Flavonoid | Detected | Detectable |
| Formononetin-7-O-β-D-glc-6'-O-acetate | 芒柄花素-7-葡萄糖-6'-乙酸酯 | Astragalus membranaceus | Acetylated flavonoid glycoside | Detected | Undetectable |
| 9,10-dimethoxy-pterocarpan-3-O-β-D-glc-6'-O-acetate | 9,10-二甲氧基紫檀烷-3-葡萄糖-6'-乙酸酯 | Astragalus membranaceus | Acetylated pterocarpan glycoside | Detected | Undetectable |
| 2'-hydroxy-3',4'-dimethoxyisoflavan-7-O-β-D-glc-6'-O-acetate | 2'-羟基-3',4'-二甲氧基异黄烷-7-葡萄糖-6'-乙酸酯 | Astragalus membranaceus | Acetylated isoflavan glycoside | Detected | Undetectable |
| Astragaloside IV | 黄芪甲苷IV | Astragalus membranaceus | Triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Detectable |
| Isoastragaloside IV | 异黄芪皂苷IV | Astragalus membranaceus | Triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Undetectable |
| Agroastragaloside III | 农黄芪皂苷III | Astragalus membranaceus | Triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Undetectable |
| Astragaloside II | 黄芪皂苷II | Astragalus membranaceus | Triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Detectable |
| Soyasaponin I | 大豆皂苷I | Astragalus membranaceus | Triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Detectable |
| Formononetin | 芒柄花素 | Astragalus membranaceus | Flavonoid | Detected | Detectable |
| Astragaloside II isomer 1 | 黄芪皂苷II 异构体1 | Astragalus membranaceus | Triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Undetectable |
| 9,10-dimethoxypterocarpan | 9,10-二甲氧基紫檀烷 | Astragalus membranaceus | Pterocarpan | Detected | Undetectable |
| Astragaloside II isomer 2 | 黄芪皂苷II 异构体2 | Astragalus membranaceus | Triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Undetectable |
| 7,2'-dihydroxy-3',4'-dimethoxyisoflavan | 7,2'-二羟基-3',4'-二甲氧基异黄烷 | Astragalus membranaceus | Isoflavan | Detected | Undetectable |
| Astragaloside I | 黄芪皂苷I | Astragalus membranaceus | Triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Undetectable |
| Astragaloside I isomer 1 | 黄芪皂苷I 异构体1 | Astragalus membranaceus | Triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Undetectable |
| Astragaloside I isomer 2 | 黄芪皂苷I 异构体2 | Astragalus membranaceus | Triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Undetectable |
| Acetylastragaloside I | 乙酰黄芪皂苷I | Astragalus membranaceus | Acetylated triterpenoid saponin | Detected | Undetectable |

Chemical components of Qifu Decoction in aqueous extract (in vitro) identified by Tan 2012 (PMID:21594877).
Note: A total of 44 major components were experimentally identified by LC-TOF-MS, covering diterpenoid alkaloids, flavonoids, and triterpenoid saponins. Components marked “Detectable” represent prototype ingredients absorbed into rat plasma after oral administration.
:::




## Zhang2024
- **标题**：Multiple-matrices metabolomics combined with serum pharmacochemistry for discovering the potential targets and active constituents of Qifu decoction against heart failure 
- **PubMed ID**：38522367 
- **期刊**：Journal of Pharmaceutical and Biomedical Analysis（JPBA，SCI二区） 
- **核心数据**：
  - 依托UHPLC-Q-TOF-MS血清药物化学+多基质代谢组学研究，明确芪附汤体外水煎液含**41种化学成分**（附子27种、黄芪14种）,包括27种二萜类生物碱、7种类黄酮和7种皂苷；
  - 大鼠口服后血清中共检出**24种入血有效成分**，SUS-Plot得分图显示，包含14种原型成分、10种体内Ⅰ/Ⅱ相代谢产物； 
  - 相关性分析结果显示，共**11种成分**被鉴定为芪附汤治疗心衰的潜在活性成分，包括**8种原型成分**和**3种代谢产物**。 senbusine B, mesaconine, songorine, neoline, chasmanine, 14-acetyltalatizamine, calycosin, formononetin,demethyl dehydrogen isotalatizidine, demethyl neoline, dehydration karakoline。
  - 筛选得到尼奥林、毛蕊异黄酮2种核心药效成分，结合细胞实验证实二者可靶向调控心肌损伤通路，发挥抗心力衰竭作用。
- **核心价值**：目前芪附汤抗心衰物质基础最新、最完整的质谱实验研究，首次完整建立“体外成分-入血原型-体内代谢物”三维物质库，同时完成成分药效验证，可直接作为本研究**真实活性成分筛选的唯一金标准数据集**，彻底规避纯数据库筛选的假阳性问题。 
- **用途**：本研究**核心数据金标准**，最终入血成分筛选唯一核心依据。

::: {#supptbl-zhang2012}

:::





# Reference {-}
